description_long: This object is a robust, industrial-style computer monitor mounted on a sturdy pedestal stand. The monitor features a boxy, metallic enclosure with a patchwork of rectangular metal plates and visible rivets, giving it a utilitarian, almost futuristic appearance. The front display is a flat, black screen with a single green waveform line, suggesting it may be used for technical or monitoring purposes in an urban or industrial environment. The stand is a cylindrical metal pole attached to a wide, square base, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The entire structure is finished in a matte, bluish-gray metal, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding on any side. The design is functional and rugged, suitable for outdoor or public installations where durability is essential.
description: A rugged, boxy computer monitor with a metallic patchwork exterior, mounted on a sturdy pedestal stand and featuring a black screen with a green waveform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black display with a green waveform, framed by a thick metallic bezel.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the boxy, metallic enclosure and the depth of the monitor, with no visible screen or controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, patchwork metal back with no visible screen, buttons, or ports.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the metallic enclosure and the monitor's depth.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, metallic, and rectangular with a patchwork of metal plates and visible rivets, matching the industrial style of the enclosure. It is uniform in width and has a matte, bluish-gray finish with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a single, cylindrical metal pole attached to a wide, square metal base. It is robust and industrial, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
